en.ch01Step1Heading: How to set up your MyChart account
en.ch01Step1VideoPH: How-to clips â€” Download MyChart, register, create a username and password, set up 2FA, log in, and set your language
en.ch01Step2Heading: Help Rosa set up her language settings
en.ch01Step2Intro: Rosa just registered for MyChart. She wants to make sure the app is in her preferred language.
en.ch01Step2Intro2: Help her find the Settings menu and change her language and notification preferences.
en.ch01Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 â€” Do it on your phone
en.ch01Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch01Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch01Check1: Download the MyChart app or go to the BMC MyChart website.
en.ch01Check2: Follow the prompts to register using your information or activation code.
en.ch01Check3: Create your MyChart username and password.
en.ch01Check4: Set up Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) using your phone number.
en.ch01Check5: Log in to your new MyChart account.
en.ch01Check6: Tap the Menu icon and go to "Settings."
en.ch01Check7: Tap "Language" and select your preferred language.
en.ch01Check8: Tap "Notifications" and turn on the options you want (like text message reminders).
